message:
feat(types): replace boolean e-process samples with structured signals and decision artifacts

Introduce EProcessSignal with weighted anomaly scoring (FCW abort rate,
cache miss ratio, memory pressure), EProcessDecision for checkpoint
diagnostics, and EProcessTelemetryBridge for lock-free signal publishing.
Enrich EProcessSnapshot with rejection/priority thresholds and last signal.
Make native Cx attachment detachable via Mutex with fallback Cx and budget
conversion. Propagate e-process oracle and cancellation state to child
contexts. Add structured tracing to checkpoint decisions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
